svg.text: Apartment 302 export-prep board
A5 reference sheet: naming, likely export size, and opacity-safe usage for the first carry-forward batch.
Nursery sigil export
File: `apt302_nursery_sigil_correct_ritual_2048.png`
Target: 2048 square, transparent or dark-field, chalk breakup preserved.
Risk: over-clean export loses child-facing ash-dry read.
Opacity-safe range: roughly 0.72-0.88 in runtime use.
Mirror circle export
File: `apt302_mirror_circle_wrong_ritual_2048.png`
Target: 2048 square, transparent or dark-field, glass-green preserved.
Risk: too much contrast makes the bait lane feel mechanically correct.
Opacity-safe range: roughly 0.58-0.76 in runtime use.
Clue-note overlay export
File: `apt302_hollow_saint_clue_note_overlay_1600x900.png`
Target: 1600x900 or 1920x1080, text-safe field preserved.
Risk: decorative marks creeping under live body copy.
Export rule: keep writing field lighter than border ornament.
Ritual-status overlay export
File: `apt302_hollow_saint_ritual_status_overlay_1600x900.png`
Target: 1600x900 or 1920x1080, center cone preserved.
Risk: top/bottom bands becoming a full-screen dark vignette.
Export rule: protect first-person scene readability above ornament.
Carry-forward rule: export naming should stay explicit enough that implementation does not need to rediscover which file belongs to which approved lane.
